code:
model = Sketchup.active_model
sel = model.selection.to_a
if sel.empty?
  { 'ok' => false, 'error' => 'no objects selected' }
else
  model.start_operation('AWARE erase selected', true)
  count = sel.length
  model.entities.erase_entities(sel)
  model.commit_operation
  { 'ok' => true, 'erased' => count }
end
